'''chajomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatroepidemic|iatroepidemic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatroepidemic|iatroepidemic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chajomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjemeth|chæjemeth]] || [[word:chæjemej|chæjemej]] || [[word:chæjemesh|chæjemesh]] || [[word:chæjeme|chæjeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajojomoth|chajojomoth]] || [[word:chajojomoj|chajojomoj]] || [[word:chajojomosh|chajojomosh]] || [[word:chajojomo|chajojomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajomoth|chajomoth]] || [[word:chajomoj|chajomoj]] || [[word:chajomosh|chajomosh]] || [[word:chajomo|chajomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajofmoth|chajofmoth]] || [[word:chajofmoj|chajofmoj]] || [[word:chajofmosh|chajofmosh]] || [[word:chajofmof|chajofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajomotho|chajomotho]] || [[word:chajomojo|chajomojo]] || [[word:chajomosho|chajomosho]] || [[word:chajomoko|chajomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajomoth|chajomoth]] || [[word:chajomoj|chajomoj]] || [[word:chajomosh|chajomosh]] || [[word:chajomo|chajomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajomothol|chajomothol]] || [[word:chajomojol|chajomojol]] || [[word:chajomoshol|chajomoshol]] || [[word:chajomokol|chajomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajomothotho|chajomothotho]] || [[word:chajomojojo|chajomojojo]] || [[word:chajomoshosho|chajomoshosho]] || [[word:chajomoko|chajomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajomothon|chajomothon]] || [[word:chajomojon|chajomojon]] || [[word:chajomoshon|chajomoshon]] || [[word:chajomokon|chajomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajomothoro|chajomothoro]] || [[word:chajomojoro|chajomojoro]] || [[word:chajomoshoro|chajomoshoro]] || [[word:chajomokoro|chajomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
